lines: I'm shocked! But, a loss is a loss.
I admit I didn't work hard enough to win!
actions.speaker: SABRINA

lines: The MARSHBADGE makes POKéMON up to L70 obey you!
Stronger POKéMON will become wild, ignoring your orders in battle!
Just don't raise your POKéMON too much!
Wait, please take this TM with you!
actions.speaker: SABRINA

lines: Everyone has psychic power! People just don't realize it!
actions.speaker: SABRINA
